humanSummary.keySummary: decisions=HOLD -> HOLD -> HOLD -> REVOKE -> SUPERVISE; authority=C2=HOLD, C3=ALLOW, C4=ALLOW, C5=SUPERVISE; forensic_final=9; fallback_steps=C3, C4, C5
